summaries.title: Guard optional orchestrator methods before calling them
summaries.summary: The lesson warns against assuming that a method exists on an optional orchestrator sub-module just because the parent object exists. Always guard calls with `typeof orchestrator.subModule.method === "function"` before invoking dynamically-injected or lazily-initialized methods to prevent a single missing method from crashing an entire endpoint. This defensive programming pattern ensures robust fallback behavior when methods are unavailable.
